pkgmetadata.longdescription: Claude Desktop is the official desktop application for Claude, an AI assistant by Anthropic. This package installs the official amd64 .deb published by Anthropic at downloads.claude.ai.

use.flag: Pull in dev-util/claude-code so the bundled Claude Code integration can spawn the CLI
Pull in app-emulation/qemu and app-emulation/virtiofsd so Claude Desktop's Cowork feature can boot its sandbox microVM
